scripts.hardware:noble: bun run --cwd ../../../plugins/plugin-smartglasses build && node ../../../packages/scripts/ensure-workspace-symlinks.mjs && bun run noble-hardware-smoke.ts
scripts.smoke:package: bun run --cwd ../../../plugins/plugin-smartglasses build && node ../../../packages/scripts/ensure-workspace-symlinks.mjs && bun run package-smoke.ts
scripts.smoke:runtime: bunx turbo run build --filter=@elizaos/plugin-smartglasses --concurrency=1 && node ../../../packages/scripts/ensure-workspace-symlinks.mjs && bun run eliza-runtime-smoke.ts
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd ../../../plugins/plugin-smartglasses build && node ../../../packages/scripts/ensure-workspace-symlinks.mjs && tsc --ignoreConfig --noEmit --moduleResolution bundler --module ESNext --target ES2022 --lib ES2022,DOM --types node --skipLibCheck --strict false eliza-runtime-smoke.ts evenhub-smoke.ts hardware-evidence.ts hardware-smoke.ts noble-hardware-smoke.ts package-smoke.ts simulator-automation-smoke.ts validate-hardware-report.ts
